content.text: 工作台添加代办任务，放在任务总数的下边，用于审批零工端报名任务，包含三个字段，零工端名字，报名的任务，时间，然后有一个点击详情的按钮，点击详情出现弹窗，显示任务信息，零工端报名优势，期望薪酬，下边展示通过和驳回，在消息通知哪儿就不再展示零工端发来的申请。

Now let me look at the notification API and task API to understand the data structures:

import request from './request'

export type TaskPriority = 'p0' | 'p1' | 'p2'
export type RiskLevel = 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red'
export type AcceptanceStatus = 'pending' | 'partial' | 'all_passed' | null

export const PRIORITY_LABEL: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'P0 紧急',
  p1: 'P1 重要',
  p2: 'P2 常规',
}

export const PRIORITY_COLOR: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'red',
  p1: 'orange',
  p2: 'blue',
}

export const RISK_LABEL: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '正常',
  yellow: '关注',
  red: '风险',
}

export const RISK_COLOR: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '#52c41a',
  yellow: '#faad14',
  red: '#ff4d4f',
}

export interface CreateTaskParams {
  title: string
  description?: string
  taskMode: 'task_package' | 'daily_rate'
  totalBudget: number
  startDate?: string
  endDate?: string
  address?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  /** V3.7 验收标准 */
  acceptanceCriteria?: string
  /** V3.8 关联项目 */
  projectId?: number
  /** V3.8 关联里程碑 */
  milestoneId?: number
  roles?: {
    roleName: string
    headcount: number
    budget: number
    skillTags?: string
    description?: string
  }[]
}

export interface TaskListParams {
  status?: string
  keyword?: string
  taskMode?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级筛选 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  sortBy?: 'createdAt' | 'totalBudget' | 'publishedAt' | 'endDate' | 'priority'
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc'
  createdFrom?: string
  createdTo?: string
  hasPendingApplications?: boolean
  page?: number
  pageSize?: number
}

export const taskApi = {
  create: (data: CreateTaskParams) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/tasks', data),

  updateDraft: (id: number, data: Record<string, any>) =>
    request.put<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/draft`, data),

  setRoles: (id: number, roles: CreateTaskParams['roles']) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/roles`, { roles }),

  publish: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/publish`),

  cancel: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/cancel`),

  /** 删除任务（仅草稿/已取消/已关闭） */
  delete: (id: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  list: (params?: TaskListParams) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/tasks', { params }),

  detail: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  /** W4: 任务详情（含角色+交付物完整数据） */
  detailFull: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/full`),

  /** W4: 验收交付物 */
  review: (taskId: number, roleId: number, data: { result: 'approved' | 'rejected'; reviewNote?: string }) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${roleId}/review`, data),

  getPlatformRoles: () =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/platform-roles'),

  getSkillTags: (category?: string) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/skill-tags', { params: { category } }),

  /** W4: 获取 OSS 直传预签名 URL */
  getPresignUrl: (data: { category: string; originalName: string; fileSize: number }) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/common/upload/presign', data),

  /** 附件管理 */
  listAttachments: (taskId: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`).then((r: any) => r.data || []),
  addAttachment: (taskId: number, data: {
    fileName: string; fileUrl: string; fileSize: number; fileType: string;
  }) => request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`, data).then((r: any) => r.data),
  deleteAttachment: (taskId: number, attachmentId: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments/${attachmentId}`),

  /** V3.9: 任务审批通过（招募完成→进行中） */
  approveTask: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/approve`),

  /** V3.9: 验收确认（验收中→待付款） */
  acceptTask: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/accept`),

  /** V3.9: 验收驳回（验收中→进行中） */
  rejectAcceptance: (id: number, reason: string) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/reject-acceptance`, { reason }),

  /** V3.9: 任务执行过程节点 */
  getExecutionNodes: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/execution-nodes`),
}

+304   // 待审批报名列表（企业端工作台）

+306   async getPendingApplications(companyId: number, page = 1, pageSize = 10) {
+307     const where = {
+308       status: 'pending' as const,
+309       taskRole: { task: { companyId: BigInt(companyId) } },
+310     };
+311 
+312     const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
+313       this.prisma.taskApplication.findMany({
+314         where,
+315         include: {
+316           worker: {
+317             select: {
+318               id: true, realName: true, nickname: true, avatarUrl: true,
+319               city: true, avgRating: true, completedCount: true, level: true,
+320               bio: true, skillTags: true, isVerified: true,
+321             },
+322           },
+323           taskRole: {
+324             select: {
+325               id: true, roleName: true, headcount: true, budget: true,
+326               task: { select: { id: true, title: true, taskMode: true, status: true } },
+327             },
+328           },
+329         },
+330         orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
+331         skip: (page - 1) * pageSize,
+332         take: pageSize,
+333       }),
+334       this.prisma.taskApplication.count({ where }),
+335     ]);
+336 
+337     return {
+338       total,
+339       page,
+340       pageSize,
+341       list: list.map(a => ({
+342         applicationId: Number(a.id),
+343         workerName: a.worker.realName || a.worker.nickname || `零工#${Number(a.worker.id)}`,
+344         avatarUrl: a.worker.avatarUrl,
+345         taskTitle: a.taskRole.task.title,
+346         taskId: Number(a.taskRole.task.id),
+347         roleName: a.taskRole.roleName,
+348         createdAt: a.createdAt,
+349         // 详情弹窗所需
+350         introduction: a.intro,
+351         expectPay: a.expectPay ? Number(a.expectPay) : null,
+352         workerId: Number(a.worker.id),
+353         city: a.worker.city,
+354         avgRating: Number(a.worker.avgRating),
+355         completedCount: a.worker.completedCount,
+356         level: a.worker.level,
+357         bio: a.worker.bio,
+358         skills: Array.isArray(a.worker.skillTags) ? (a.worker.skillTags as string[]) : [],
+359         verified: a.worker.isVerified,
+360         taskMode: a.taskRole.task.taskMode,
+361         roleBudget: Number(a.taskRole.budget),
+362       })),
+363     };

content.text: Now add the endpoint to the DashboardController:

Now update the frontend dashboard API:

edits.newText:
import request from './request'

export interface PendingApplication {
  applicationId: number
  workerName: string
  avatarUrl: string | null
  taskTitle: string
  taskId: number
  roleName: string
  createdAt: string
  introduction: string
  expectPay: number | null
  workerId: number
  city: string | null
  avgRating: number
  completedCount: number
  level: string | null
  bio: string | null
  skills: string[]
  verified: boolean
  taskMode: string
  roleBudget: number
}

export interface PendingApplicationResult {
  total: number
  page: number
  pageSize: number
  list: PendingApplication[]
}

export const dashboardApi = {
  company:  () => request.get('/dashboard'),
  platform: () => request.get('/dashboard/platform'),
  pendingApplications: (params?: { page?: number; pageSize?: number }) =>
    request.get<any, PendingApplicationResult>('/dashboard/pending-applications', { params }),
}

+324 function formatTodoTime(t: string) {
+325   if (!t) return ''
+326   return new Date(t).toLocaleString('zh-CN', {
+327     month: '2-digit', day: '2-digit',
+328     hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
+329   })
+330 }

+332 async function loadTodoList() {
+333   todoLoading.value = true
+334   try {
+335     const res = await dashboardApi.pendingApplications({ page: todoPage.value, pageSize: 5 })
+336     todoList.value = res?.list ?? []
+337     todoTotal.value = res?.total ?? 0
+338   } catch {
+339     todoList.value = []
+340     todoTotal.value = 0
+341   } finally {
+342     todoLoading.value = false
+343   }
+344 }
+345 
+346 function handleTodoTableChange(pagination: any) {
+347   todoPage.value = pagination.current
+348   loadTodoList()
+349 }
+350 
+351 function openReviewDialog(record: PendingApplication) {
+352   currentApplication.value = record
+353   reviewDialogOpen.value = true
+354 }
+355 
+356 function onApplicationReviewed() {
+357   loadTodoList()
+358   // 刷新主看板数据（任务状态可能变化）
+359   loadData()
+360 }

前后端都编译通过。让我快速确认一下最终的 Dashboard 页面结构是否正确：

所有改动完成。下面总结一下做了什么：

---

改动涉及 6 个文件，分为后端和前端两部分：

**后端（2 个文件）**

- [dashboard.service.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/task/dashboard.service.ts) — 新增 `getPendingApplications()` 方法，查询当前企业所有 `pending` 状态的报名记录，返回零工名称、报名任务、时间、自我介绍、期望薪酬等完整信息
- [admin.controller.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/admin/admin.controller.ts) — 新增 `GET /dashboard/pending-applications` 接口，支持分页

**前端（4 个文件）**

- [dashboard.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/api/dashboard.ts) — 新增 `PendingApplication` 类型定义和 `pendingApplications()` API 调用
- [ApplicationReviewDialog.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/components/ApplicationReviewDialog.vue) — 新建审批弹窗组件，展示任务信息、报名优势（自我介绍）、期望薪酬，底部有「通过」和「驳回」按钮，驳回需填写原因
- [DashboardPage.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage.vue) — 在 KPI 指标卡下方新增「待办任务 — 报名审批」表格，包含零工名称、报名任务、时间三列 + 查看详情按钮，点击打开审批弹窗
- [NotificationBell.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/components/layout/NotificationBell.vue) + [NotificationPage.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/pages/notification/NotificationPage.vue) — 过滤掉 `task_application` 类型通知，移除「📝 报名审批」Tab
在任务广场点击某一条任务，然后点击任务详情，现在的页面不懂，需要新加，零工端上传上来的工作日志，检查点，交付物，就是把消息通知的如图的这个界面的最底下的那段页面移动到任务详情里，那几个tab页，只要工作日志，交付物版本，检查点，同时把零工端消息通知的那块儿给去掉。

改动涉及 1 个文件 [TaskListPage.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/pages/task/TaskListPage.vue)，具体变更：

**任务详情抽屉新增 3 个 Tab**
- 📝 工作日志 — `TaskProgressLogPanel`，展示零工上传的工作日志
- 📦 交付物版本 — `DeliverableVersionBrowser`，展示交付物的版本历史
- 📋 检查点 — `TaskCheckpointPanel`，展示检查点提交与审核状态

**移除消息相关功能**
- 删除了抽屉中的 `ImChatPanel` 消息面板
- 删除了每个零工分配行旁边的「消息」按钮
- 清理了 `activeConversation`、`openImPanel` 等不再使用的状态和方法
- 移除了 `ImChatPanel` 组件的导入

现在从任务广场点击任务 → 查看详情，抽屉底部会显示零工上传的工作日志、交付物版本、检查点三个 Tab 页，不再显示消息通知相关内容。
